ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment purpose and objectives */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, lab technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment corresponding to the measurements */,
  "pulse_v" REAL /* Pulse voltage applied during the measurement */,
  "pulse_width" REAL /* Width of the pulse applied (in seconds) */,
  "num_applied" INTEGER /* Number of applied pulses */,
  "meas_v" REAL /* Measured voltage response */,
  "current_values" TEXT /* Array of current readings taken during the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the measurement */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the measurement (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "current_readings" (
  "current_reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current reading */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the current reading */,
  "reading_index" INTEGER /* Index of the current reading in the array */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The actual current value recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the current reading was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_current_readings_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment record */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., oscilloscope, multimeter) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the readme file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was recorded */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Level of the error (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment corresponding to this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of this version's creation */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_previous_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_version_id") REFERENCES experiment_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrumentation" (
  "instrumentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrumentation record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment corresponding to the instrumentation */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument used */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Instrumentation settings used during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrumentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrumentation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
